summary: Completed comprehensive testing of new signup flow, admin approval workflow, and driver-specific portal. All key features working correctly: 1) Login page clean without test credentials, 2) Signup page accepts name/email/phone/password, 3) Signup requests visible to admin, 4) Admin can approve with role or reject, 5) Driver portal shows full page with profile/vehicle/plant/documents, 6) Drivers correctly routed to /driver-portal after login.

minor.issue: Returns 404 if driver profile not linked via emp_id - need emp_id in users table to match drivers table

issues: Console warning: Missing DialogDescription or aria-describedby for accessibility (non-blocking)

critical_code_review_comments: ApprovalQueue still shows 'VEHICLE: N/A' and 'Unknown' for submitter - this was flagged in previous iteration as entity_data display issue
seed_data_creation: Multiple TEST_ prefixed signup requests created during testing for approval/rejection workflow
context_for_next_testing_agent: All new features tested: 1) Login page is clean (no test creds), 2) Signup page with all fields working, 3) Signup request flow creates pending request visible in admin's Signup Requests page, 4) Admin can approve (with role selection modal) or reject requests, 5) Approved users can login, 6) Driver portal full page shows profile/vehicle/plant/documents with expiry status, 7) Drivers auto-routed to /driver-portal on login. Previous issue: ApprovalQueue entity_data display still shows N/A.
passed_tests: Login page - No test credentials shown
Signup page - Accepts name, email, phone, password, confirm password
Signup flow - Submit creates pending request
Admin Signup Requests page - Shows pending requests
Admin Signup Requests page - Approve with role selection modal
Admin Signup Requests page - Reject functionality
Driver Portal - Full page without sidebar
Driver Portal - Shows profile info (name, emp_id, phone, DL)
Driver Portal - Shows documents with expiry status
Approvals page accessible and shows queue
